recs.s: NEW (15 failures across 2 workflows today): copilot+sonnet-4.6 agents are emitting `add_comment` payloads with `target="*"` but no `item_number/issue_number/pull_request_number`. Affected: Contribution Check (1) and PR Sous Chef #2 (14). Two-pronged fix: (1) update the prompt/agent instructions for these workflows to never emit target=* without an explicit item_number, and (2) tighten safe-output schema validation at the MCP boundary so the error fires at agent-time (cheap to retry) instead of at safe-output-processing time (workflow-failure).

NEW: Smoke Claude CLI reported success (terminal_reason=completed, 19/20 tests passed) but the GitHub Actions step `Execute Claude Code CLI` timed out 52s after CLI exit. Bump `timeout-minutes` for that step from 10 to 12 (or 15) in the harness action.yaml. Root cause is likely the wrapper draining stdout/stderr or running cleanup post-exit. Also worth investigating whether the wrapper needs an explicit early-exit after CLI process completes.

URGENT: Daily Safe Output Tool Optimizer cost jumped $6.05 → $9.90 (+64%) in 24 hours. New daily high, past the original $8.54 peak. 19.4m / 14.9M tokens / 97 turns. Compare today's run (26475821926) prompt and inputs against yesterday's. Most likely cause: prompt change, OR an unbounded input grew (more workflows to optimize → more iterations). If unbounded input, add a cap. Single workflow now = 38% of daily spend.

DOWN to 1 workflow today: Changeset Generator still uses model `gpt-5.3-codex` in aw_info.json. All other codex workflows (AI Moderator, Daily Cache Strategy Analyzer, Smoke Codex) succeed using `gpt-5.4`. Single workflow-frontmatter edit fixes the last codex failure: set `model: gpt-5.4` in the Changeset Generator workflow.

RECURRED after 1-day quiet: 1 occurrence today (PR Sous Chef #1). The pattern is intermittent, not resolved. Likely root cause is an init race between awf-squid and awf-iptables-init (they start concurrently in docker-compose). Either (a) add a `depends_on` with `service_healthy` condition to awf-squid → awf-iptables-init, or (b) extend squid's healthcheck retry budget.

NEW: Smoke Copilot's upload_artifact test failed because the staging directory was empty. Other engines' smoke tests pass — the issue is Copilot-specific. Most likely the smoke-copilot.md prompt is missing the `mkdir -p` + `cp <file>` step that other smoke prompts have before calling upload_artifact. Compare smoke-claude.md and smoke-copilot.md side-by-side for the upload_artifact section.

CARRY (day 6): variance now 0-217 turns across 4 runs (avg 142.8). 2/4 failures today both unrelated to drift (infra + add_comment bug). Drift itself probably reflects 'PR has no work' vs 'PR has lots of work' — legitimate variance, not a prompt-stability bug. Keep as low-priority watch.
CONFIRM (day 3): 31 copilot runs today; 0 ENOENT, 0 anthropic-beta errors. Pin 1.0.52 as minimum allowed version in CI to prevent regression.
Block rate 16.4%, flat from yesterday. Mostly `(unknown)` DNS-failure blocks + smoke-test intentional blocks. Continue as watch.
